name: Coming Soon
title: Coming Soon - Start Bootstrap Theme
description: Fullscreen coming soon page with video background. A looping background video plays behind a dark teal overlay (#2a5555 at 70% opacity). The masthead occupies the left portion of the screen (75vw on desktop, 65vw on xl) with a skewed black overlay (transform: skewX(-9deg)). Content includes an italic heading Our Website is Coming Soon, descriptive paragraph, and an email signup form with Notify Me button. Social icons (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram) are positioned vertically on the right side on desktop, horizontally below on mobile. On mobile devices, a fallback background image replaces the video. The masthead content is constrained to max-width 40rem. DM Sans font throughout with Tinos for italic accents.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with italic serif accents, modern and minimal

layoutDetails: Fullscreen layout with fixed video background. Masthead takes 75vw on desktop (65vw on xl) with skewed overlay. Social icons absolutely positioned on right side. Mobile fallback uses background image instead of video. Content max-width 40rem.
visualStyle: Cinematic dark fullscreen with video background, teal-tinted overlay, and asymmetric skewed content panel. Moody and atmospheric pre-launch aesthetic.

name: Count
title: Count - Demo
description: Coming soon / under construction template available in 3 variants (static background, slideshow, particles). Demo index page shows 3 preview thumbnails linking to each variant. Static variant features: fullscreen dark overlay on background image, logo at top, split layout with left content area (welcome heading, large multi-line title, description paragraph, email subscribe form with 'Notify Me' button) and right countdown timer (Days, H, M, S with large numbers). Bottom social links row (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Behance, Dribbble) with labels. Info panel toggle reveals slide-out overlay with About text and Contact details. Copyright bar. Preloader with line-scale-pulse animation.

typography.style: Modern sans-serif body (Metropolis) with serif headings (Domine). Light body weight for elegance. Bold serif headings for impact. Large countdown numbers.

layoutDetails: Fullscreen single-viewport layout. Split content: 8-column text area and 4-column countdown timer. Info panel slides in as overlay. Social links as horizontal list at bottom. Responsive at 400px, 600px, 800px.
visualStyle: Dark, dramatic coming-soon page with hot pink accent. Fullscreen background image with dark overlay. Large countdown timer as visual focal point. Three background variants for customization. Slide-out info panel for additional content.

name: Imminent
title: Imminent - Demo
description: Dark-themed coming soon / launch page with multiple background variants (static, slideshow, particles). Preloader with dots-fade animation. Minimal header with logo and email contact link. Hero section fills the viewport with a grid overlay pattern: 'Coming Soon' subheading, large multi-line heading announcing upcoming website launch, countdown timer showing Days/Hours/Minutes/Seconds, and a 'Notify Me' button that opens a modal with email subscription form. Social icons row (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Dribbble, Behance) and scroll-for-more indicator. Below-fold info section with vertical decorative line and tabbed content: About tab with company intro and hosting CTA, Services tab with 6 service items in a 2-column grid (Brand Identity, Illustration, Web Design, Product Strategy, UI/UX Design, Mobile Design), and Contact tab with address, social links, email, and phone numbers. Footer with copyright and back-to-top. Three style variants available: static background, slideshow background, and particles background.

typography.style: Clean modern sans-serif throughout with bold headings

layoutDetails: Full-viewport hero section, max-width row container for info section, flexbox grid, responsive with tab-full stacking
visualStyle: Dark dramatic coming-soon page with lime green accents, countdown timer, grid overlay, and tabbed info section

name: Khronos
title: Khronos 2.0 - Demo
description: Modern coming soon / launch page template with three style variations (static background, slideshow, particles). The static version features a fullscreen hero section with a large countdown timer (days, hours, minutes, seconds) and a headline announcing site launch. Below the fold is a tabbed info section with three tabs: About (company description with two-column sub-layout), Services (6 service items in a 2-column grid with SVG icons: Brand Identity, Illustration, Web Design, Product Strategy, UI/UX Design, E-Commerce), and Subscribe (newsletter signup form with email input). The footer has two columns: company info with social media SVG icons (Facebook, Twitter, Pinterest, Instagram, Dribbble) and contact info (phone, email, office address). Header displays a logo and social icon row. Scroll indicator with animated mouse icon. CSS custom properties for theming with teal/rust color scheme.

typography.style: Modern sans-serif with Inter font, clean and geometric. CSS custom properties for responsive type scale.

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling layout with fullscreen hero. 12-column grid system with responsive stacking. Tabbed content section below fold. Footer in two-column layout stacking on mobile at 700px.
visualStyle: Dark, moody, sophisticated coming soon page with deep teal and rust accent colors. Fullscreen countdown hero with scroll indicator. Clean tabbed content below. Professional and modern.

name: Coming
title: Coming Soon Template
description: Single-page coming soon / countdown template with a clean, modern design. Features a fullscreen layout with a preloader spinner animation. The main content is centered with a large countdown timer displaying days, hours, minutes, and seconds in circular elements. Above the countdown is a large title heading with bounceIn animation. Below the countdown are 4 feature items in a responsive grid (col-md-3, col-sm-6), each with a circular image, heading, and description text using fadeInUp WOW.js animations. A team section shows 3 team members in a 2-column media layout (col-md-6, col-sm-6) with circular avatar images, names, and descriptions. A newsletter subscription form at the bottom has an email input and subscribe button. Green (#7ad03a) accent color for buttons and highlights. Uses Open Sans font with light and regular weights.

typography.style: Clean Open Sans with bold uppercase title and green accent highlights

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid. Centered countdown timer with circular elements. 4-column (col-md-3) features grid. 2-column (col-md-6) team media layout. Full-width newsletter form. Single-page centered layout.
visualStyle: Clean, modern coming soon page with green accent. Circular countdown elements, circular team avatars, WOW.js scroll animations. Minimal and focused on launch anticipation.

name: Coming Soon
title: Coming Soon | Dark and Light versions
description: Single-page coming soon template with dark and light version variants. Features a centered layout with a large heading, descriptive text, and a prominent countdown timer. The page has a fullscreen background with a clean, minimal design. A subscription form with email input allows visitors to sign up for notifications. The template includes both a dark version (dark background with light text) and a light version (white background with dark text) in separate directories. Uses Dosis font for headings and Open Sans for body text. Orange (#fd9426) accent color for buttons and interactive elements. Simple, focused design with no navigation or complex sections, just the essential coming soon information.

typography.style: Dual-font pairing with geometric Dosis headings and clean Open Sans body text

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid. Centered single-column layout. Fullscreen hero with countdown. Email subscription form. Two separate directories for dark and light versions.
visualStyle: Minimal, focused coming soon page with orange accent. Clean typography, centered layout, no distractions. Available in both dark and light color schemes.

name: Curvy Soon
title: Curvy Coming Soon Template
description: Coming soon page with distinctive curvy section borders (border-radius 60%). Dark (#212121) countdown section with orange (#ff5722) subtitle and 4 circular countdown timers. White divider with 4 media items and dark circular icons. Team section on orange background with 4 circular photos. Dark contact section with email subscription. Dark footer with social icons.

typography.style: Semibold headings, regular body on dark backgrounds

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid, container max-width 900px. Curvy borders using border-radius 60%. Sections padded 60-100px. Team col-md-3. Media col-md-6.
visualStyle: Bold dark theme with deep orange accent and unique curvy/organic section borders. Circular elements throughout. High contrast palette.

name: Get Ready
title: Get Ready - Coming Soon Template
description: Coming-soon countdown page with fullscreen background image slideshow powered by Vegas.js. A preloader spinner fades in the main content. Decorative vertical grid lines (5 columns) overlay the viewport. A hamburger menu icon opens a full-screen navigation panel with links, studio address with embedded Google Map iframe, and a row of social media icons (Facebook, Twitter, Google, Instagram). The main home section features a large heading announcing a creative site launch, a 4-unit countdown timer (days, hours, minutes, seconds), and a rounded pill-shaped email subscription form with an envelope icon submit button. Dark gradient overlay (tan-to-black) covers the background slideshow.

typography.style: Ultra-light weight throughout, minimal and airy feel with thin Poppins font

layoutDetails: Fullscreen viewport with fixed grid lines overlay. Content centered via Bootstrap container. Vegas.js handles background image slideshow. Hamburger menu triggers full-screen overlay navigation panel.
visualStyle: Dark cinematic coming-soon page with tan/wheat gradient overlay on background slideshow, thin grid lines, and minimal typography.

name: Kool Form Pack
title: Kool Form Pack | Coming Soon Page
description: Coming soon / pre-launch landing page built on Bootstrap 5 with a video background. Features a header with the site title and a hamburger menu that opens an off-canvas navigation panel with a subscription form. The hero section displays a large countdown timer (Days, Hours, Minutes, Seconds) with bold Unbounded font numerals over a full-screen background video. Below the countdown, a brief description text and social media icon links. The off-canvas menu includes a styled email subscription form. Uses Poppins for body text and Unbounded for display elements with a warm terracotta/coral color scheme.

typography.style: Display font (Unbounded) for countdown numbers and headings. Clean Poppins for body text. Warm terracotta accent color.

layoutDetails: Full-viewport hero with video background. Centered countdown timer with large numerals. Off-canvas slide-in menu with subscription form. Minimal footer.
visualStyle: Dark cinematic coming-soon page. Full-screen video background with overlay. Large countdown timer as focal point. Warm terracotta/coral accent against dark backdrop.
